testcase.name: testGetInstructorById
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select i1_0.id, i1_0.email, i1_0.name from Instructor i1_0 where i1_0.id=?
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO org.springframework.data.repository.config.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate - Bootstrapping Spring Data JPA repositories in DEFAULT mode. [main] INFO org.springframework.data.repository.config.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate - Finished Spring Data repository scanning in 52 ms. Found 3 JPA repository interfaces. [main] WARN org.springframework.context.support.PostProcessorRegistrationDelegate$BeanPostProcessorChecker - Bean 'appConfig' of type [org.example.config.AppConfig$$SpringCGLIB$$0] is not eligible for getting processed by all BeanPostProcessors (for example: not eligible for auto-proxying). The currently created BeanPostProcessor [exceptionTranslation] is declared through a non-static factory method on that class; consider declaring it as static instead. Jul 29, 2025 3:28:26 PM org.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper logPersistenceUnitInformation INFO: HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: default] Jul 29, 2025 3:28:26 PM org.hibernate.Version logVersion INFO: HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 7.0.6.Final [main] INFO org.springframework.orm.jpa.persistenceunit.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo - No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer Jul 29, 2025 3:28:27 PM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.dialect.internal.DialectFactoryImpl constructDialect WARN: HHH90000025: MySQLDialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) Jul 29, 2025 3:28:27 PM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.env.internal.JdbcEnvironmentInitiator logConnectionInfo INFO: HHH10001005: Database info: Database JDBC URL [jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/elearning_test?useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=UTC] Database driver: MySQL Connector/J Database version: 8.0.39 Autocommit mode: undefined/unknown Isolation level: REPEATABLE_READ [default REPEATABLE_READ] Pool: DatasourceConnectionProviderImpl Minimum pool size: undefined/unknown Maximum pool size: undefined/unknown Jul 29, 2025 3:28:28 PM org.hibernate.engine.transaction.jta.platform.internal.JtaPlatformInitiator initiateService INFO: HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) [main] INFO org.springframework.orm.jpa.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean - Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' [main] INFO org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query.QueryEnhancerFactory - Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used.

testcase.name: testGetAllCourses
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.description, c1_0.instructor_id, c1_0.title from Course c1_0 Hibernate: select i1_0.id, i1_0.email, i1_0.name from Instructor i1_0 where i1_0.id=? Hibernate: select i1_0.id, i1_0.email, i1_0.name from Instructor i1_0 where i1_0.id=? Hibernate: select i1_0.id, i1_0.email, i1_0.name from Instructor i1_0 where i1_0.id=? Hibernate: select i1_0.id, i1_0.email, i1_0.name from Instructor i1_0 where i1_0.id=? Hibernate: select i1_0.id, i1_0.email, i1_0.name from Instructor i1_0 where i1_0.id=? Hibernate: select i1_0.id, i1_0.email, i1_0.name from Instructor i1_0 where i1_0.id=? Hibernate: select i1_0.id, i1_0.email, i1_0.name from Instructor i1_0 where i1_0.id=?

testcase.name: testCreateAndReadCourse
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select i1_0.id, i1_0.email, i1_0.name from Instructor i1_0 where i1_0.id=? Hibernate: insert into Course (description, instructor_id, title) values (?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.description, i1_0.id, i1_0.email, i1_0.name, c1_0.title from Course c1_0 left join Instructor i1_0 on i1_0.id=c1_0.instructor_id where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.description, i1_0.id, i1_0.email, i1_0.name, c1_0.title from Course c1_0 left join Instructor i1_0 on i1_0.id=c1_0.instructor_id where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select e1_0.course_id, e1_0.id, e1_0.enrollment_date, e1_0.student_name from Enrollment e1_0 where e1_0.course_id=? Hibernate: delete from Course where id=?

testcase.name: testSearchCourse
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.description, c1_0.instructor_id, c1_0.title from Course c1_0 where c1_0.title like ? escape '' Hibernate: select i1_0.id, i1_0.email, i1_0.name from Instructor i1_0 where i1_0.id=?
